title: disable_sounds_attached_to_player_then_something child-teardown loop type-gates objFreePermanently (retail frees every child unconditionally)

evidence.path: src/game/chr.c:3347 vs GLOBAL_ASM disable_sounds_attached_to_player_then_something 0x7F020414 (glabel chr.c:3378, child loop 0x7F0204E4-0x7F020500)

history.evidence: src/game/chr.c:3347 vs GLOBAL_ASM disable_sounds_attached_to_player_then_something 0x7F020414 (glabel chr.c:3378, child loop 0x7F0204E4-0x7F020500)
history.note: Retail loops over prop child (offset 0x20) and, for every child, calls objDetach(child) then objFreePermanently(child union field at offset 0x4, 1) unconditionally, advancing via child prev-or-nextSibling at offset 0x24 (the ASM child loop at 0x7F0204E4). The NATIVE_PORT body reproduces the detach and the offset-0x24 walk but gates the free: it only calls objFreePermanently(child obj) when child type is OBJ, WEAPON, or DOOR and child obj is non-NULL and child obj prop equals the child. So non-OBJ/WEAPON/DOOR children (or children whose back-pointer is stale) are detached but never freed, whereas retail frees the offset-0x4 pointer regardless. The decomp itself flagged this loop as suspect. Same function also adds NATIVE-only hardening not in the ASM: prop null/type/chr guard on entry, sndStateIsOwnedBySlot ownership checks plus null-out of all four SEbuffer pointers at offsets 0x168-0x174 (ASM deactivates without ownership check and without nulling), and null guards before sub_GAME_7F050DE8 and clear_aircraft_model_obj (ASM calls both unconditionally with the model at chr offset 0x1c). Needs an oracle-backed prop-teardown route to decide whether retail unconditional free is observable (n64-quirk to preserve) or a safe simplification (documented parity-divergence).
